summary: Codex runtime support implemented and committed (426707f). All 12 files changed across CLI, MCP, watchdog. Moving to Phase 3: end-to-end testing of every CLI surface with --runtime codex.
key_facts: Commit 426707f: codex runtime support across CLI/MCP/watchdog
generateLaunchSh() handles both claude and codex
--runtime flag added to create, start, fork
fleet ls shows RUNTIME column when codex workers exist
impl-core told to stand down — doing it all directly
Pre-commit hook requires doc sync proof for cli/ changes
